login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to manage your properties

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: We sent a password reset link to your email address. Click the link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.failedToSend: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
forgotPassword.secureDescription: Your property data is protected with secure authentication. Reset your password to regain access to your workspace.
forgotPassword.step2: Check your inbox for the reset link
forgotPassword.step3: Create a new password and sign back in

validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
